div.h2: Summary Statistics Table Generation — strace -c Data Walk

g.text: Observer Effect: measured time ≠ true syscall cost
Total: 400 slots × 24 bytes = 9.6 KB (fits in L1 cache)
stats_record() — called at every exit stop (stats.c)
% time | seconds | usecs/call | calls | errors | syscall
Note: usecs/call includes 2× ptrace context-switch overhead (~1-10 µs each)
Step 2 — Build sort_entry_t[], qsort by total_ns DESC
